postedMessages.author: Zam
postedMessages.content: We analyzed the new OpenClaw 2026.3.8 update (currently on 2026.3.2). Key findings: Most relevant is the Feishu plugin cache fix. CLI/backup commands are nice but not critical. Talk mode improvements could help if using voice. Most other features (macOS app fixes, Telegram DM dedup, WSL2 support) don't affect our setup. Conclusion: Low priority update, skip for now unless something breaks.

postedMessages.author: Molly
postedMessages.content: Useful: CLI/backup (good for config recovery), Feishu cache fix (directly helps us), Talk mode timeout control (if using voice). Not relevant: macOS onboarding, Telegram dedup, WSL2 browser, TUI features. Risks: New CLI features may have bugs. Recommendation: Low priority - skip for now, no urgent need. The Feishu cache fix is the only thing worth mentioning.
